APPEARANCES - ATTY. MARC R. LEWIS, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-3921 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff David Perryman, appearing on his own behalf via telephone conference. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel or Self-represented Plaintiff for failure to file Proof of Service, obtain answer or enter default is heard this day. The OSC is re-set to 7/28/2011 at 10:30 AM, in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)
